reason: 父级 review 基线，定义第一轮事实源和控制面收束优先级
Lifecycle / Workflow / Task 清理证据和后续任务候选
AgentRun / Session / Runtime Gateway 清理证据和后续任务候选
Permission / Contracts / Frontend capability 清理证据和后续任务候选
VFS / Local / Relay / Extension 第二轮装配层与 contract 清理证据
Lifecycle run / orchestration runtime 边界
Runtime node state 由 orchestration reducer 写入的契约
Task / Story execution projection 的 association / anchor / runtime node 事实链
AgentRun / RuntimeSession 分层边界
AgentRun mailbox durable intake / scheduler / command receipt 契约
SessionExecutionState 和 workspace command/control projection 边界
PermissionGrant 作为 runtime capability grant 事实源
跨层 generated contract 单源规则
前端 generated DTO 消费和禁止手写跨层 union 的规则
VFS surface / mount / provider 分层边界
VFS access 与 mount-root-bounded 工具执行边界
VFS materialization 与 local/cloud 两段式边界
Local runtime / Tauri thin shell / extension trusted runtime 边界
Backend workspace routing 与 local workspace binding 事实源
RuntimeGateway actor/context/action invocation 与 provider validation 边界
